name: power-scaled-penetration
description: Validate fixed one-second attack cadence, power-scaled lunge distance, swept block penetration, and server-owned physics impulses.

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("Reset") c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=15,WallLevel=99,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0,BreakSpeed=99}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(-2,3,-20),Vector3.new(-2,3,-200)) p:SetAttribute("LastWallHit",0) local first=c:Invoke("PunchWithCooldown") local second=c:Invoke("PunchWithCooldown") return H:JSONEncode({first=first.ok,second=second.ok,reason=second.reason,breakSpeed=second.BreakSpeed,interval=workspace.PunchWallRPG:GetAttribute("PunchAttackInterval")})

steps.label: server rejects sub-second repeat regardless of break speed

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("Reset") c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=15,WallLevel=99,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local hrp=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart hrp.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(-2,3,-20),Vector3.new(-2,3,-200)) p:SetAttribute("LastWallHit",0) local r=c:Invoke("PunchRadius") return H:JSONEncode({ok=r.ok,outcome=r.outcome,requested=p:GetAttribute("LastPunchRequestedDistance"),travel=p:GetAttribute("LastPunchLungeDistance"),scale=p:GetAttribute("LastPunchPowerScale"),limit=p:GetAttribute("LastPunchPenetrationLimit"),force=p:GetAttribute("LastPunchImpactForceScale"),hit=p:GetAttribute("LastRadiusHitCount"),broken=r.BrokenDepthBlocks,fragments=#workspace.PunchWallRPG["Depth Physics Debris"]:GetChildren()})

steps.label: starter power breaks front block with short lunge

args.code: local H=game:GetService("HttpService") local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke("Reset") c:Invoke("SetStats",{Power=1500000000,WallLevel=99,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local hrp=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart hrp.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(-2,3,-20),Vector3.new(-2,3,-200)) p:SetAttribute("LastWallHit",0) local r=c:Invoke("PunchRadius") task.wait(0.15) local maxSpeed,maxInitial,serverOwned=0,0,0 for _,f in ipairs(workspace.PunchWallRPG["Depth Physics Debris"]:GetChildren()) do maxSpeed=math.max(maxSpeed,f.AssemblyLinearVelocity.Magnitude) maxInitial=math.max(maxInitial,f:GetAttribute("InitialForwardSpeed") or 0) local ok,owner=pcall(function() return f:GetNetworkOwner() end) if ok and owner==nil then serverOwned+=1 end end return H:JSONEncode({ok=r.ok,outcome=r.outcome,requested=p:GetAttribute("LastPunchRequestedDistance"),travel=p:GetAttribute("LastPunchLungeDistance"),scale=p:GetAttribute("LastPunchPowerScale"),limit=p:GetAttribute("LastPunchPenetrationLimit"),force=p:GetAttribute("LastPunchImpactForceScale"),hit=p:GetAttribute("LastRadiusHitCount"),broken=r.BrokenDepthBlocks,fragments=#workspace.PunchWallRPG["Depth Physics Debris"]:GetChildren(),maxSpeed=maxSpeed,maxInitial=maxInitial,serverOwned=serverOwned})

steps.label: high power carves a long server-physics tunnel
